scope: core scored tb/e2e prompt design audit after EVAS-only gold consistency repair and DeepSeek v4-pro baseline rescore
verdict: Gold/testbench/checker assets are EVAS-consistent, but public tb/e2e prompts under-specify runnable Spectre .scs structure. Current tb/e2e baseline failures therefore measure Spectre-testbench syntax and integration burden in addition to Verilog-A circuit reasoning.

evidence.full_evas_only_audit: 325/325 expected outcomes met; 271 PASS gold/fixed, 54 expected buggy FAIL_SIM_CORRECTNESS

findings.title: tb/e2e prompts lack a complete runnable Spectre .scs skeleton
findings.impact: Models must infer Spectre file structure, instance syntax, save syntax, and include placement. This makes tb/e2e forms partly a Spectre syntax-recall benchmark rather than a circuit-behavior benchmark.
evidence: Core tb/e2e feature audit: full_scs_skeleton = 0/66 for tb and 0/66 for e2e.
CDAC generated candidate omitted ahdl_include and used module-first instance syntax: cdac_cal DUT (...), causing dut_not_compiled / tb_not_executed.
Passing comparator tb candidate used ahdl_include and Spectre instance form: Icomparator (...) comparator.
findings.recommendation: Add a public .scs scaffold block to every tb/e2e prompt: simulator header, global 0, parameters/supplies, exact ahdl_include line, exact Spectre instance syntax Xname (nodes...) module, tran line, save line, and return-only artifact rule.

findings.title: e2e forms conflate DUT synthesis and Spectre harness synthesis
findings.impact: 0/66 e2e PASS suggests current e2e score is too harsh for interpreting model Verilog-A ability. It is useful as an integration stress test, but should not dominate the headline model baseline without stratified reporting.
evidence: DeepSeek v4-pro core e2e result: 0/66 PASS.
Pipeline ADC e2e prompt asks for both multi-stage DUT behavior and a full transient harness with many observables, but still no complete .scs skeleton.
findings.recommendation: Report dut/bugfix/tb/e2e separately. Treat e2e as D3/integration tier unless prompt scaffolding is upgraded and a fresh A/B baseline confirms expected difficulty.

findings.title: Spectre instance syntax is not explicit enough
findings.impact: Multiple failed candidates wrote SPICE/module-first style instances, which compile-fails before checker semantics. This is a prompt/interface issue, not an analog reasoning failure.
evidence: Failing CDAC tb candidate: cdac_cal DUT (...) instead of XDUT (...) cdac_cal.
Failing pipeline ADC e2e testbench similarly used pipeline_adc_chain_4b DUT (...).
findings.recommendation: Add a hard rule and example: Use Spectre AHDL instance syntax `XDUT (node1 node2 ...) module_name`; never write `module_name instance (...)`.

findings.title: Release prompt conventions are not fully normalized
findings.impact: Some prompts have richer interface/observable blocks than others. The benchmark is functionally valid, but inconsistent prompt shape adds unwanted variance across categories.
evidence: All core tb/e2e prompts mention required artifacts and include literals, but only a subset uses the newer explicit saved-waveform-column wording.
Legacy task-specific prompts and newer designed-source prompts coexist.
findings.recommendation: Regenerate prompt contracts through one shared template for tb and e2e: public interface, allowed constants, stimulus schedule, saved columns, checker-observable contract, and no-gold-leak rule.

findings.title: Supply/parameter assumptions are under-constrained in some tb/e2e prompts
findings.impact: Candidates may pick plausible but wrong supplies or timing constants; failures then reflect unstated benchmark assumptions.
evidence: Failing CDAC tb candidate selected VDD_val=1.2, while the benchmark task expects its own fixed operating contract.
Prompts state transient/check columns, but not always a complete parameter/supply scaffold.
findings.recommendation: Include exact public operating constants in the scaffold whenever checker correctness depends on them.

recommended_next_actions: Implement a common tb/e2e .scs scaffold generator in the prompt sync path, not per-task hand edits.
Add explicit Spectre AHDL instance syntax examples and ahdl_include placement to every tb/e2e prompt.
Run a 12- to 20-form DeepSeek prompt A/B smoke after scaffolding: same model, regenerated candidates, covering easy/medium/hard tb/e2e rows.
Only after A/B, decide whether e2e remains headline-scored or is reported as an integration/D3 tier.
Keep current EVAS-only gold consistency report separate from Spectre certification; do not overclaim Spectre until the direct-SUI validation queue finishes.
